multihoming.description: Maximum interfaces with ESI under network-services multihoming
multihoming.pwhe_note: PWHE interfaces only support single-active mode

ph_pool.description: Shared pool for phX parents AND phX.Y sub-interfaces (without outer-tag)
ph_pool.note: Each PWHE service uses 2 slots (1 parent + 1 sub-interface)

stag_pool.description: Pool for PWHE phX.Ys (Q-in-Q sub-interfaces with outer-tag) - PWHE ONLY!
stag_pool.note: Physical interfaces (ge-*, lag*) with outer-tag use VLAN pool, NOT Stag pool

vlan_pool.description: Pool for physical sub-interfaces (ge-X.Y, lag-X.Y, bundle-X.Y) including L2-AC
vlan_pool.note: L2-AC sub-interfaces use this pool, NOT the Stag pool. Much larger capacity.

max_irb_and_phxy_interfaces.description: Combined limit for IRB + phX.Y interfaces
max_irb_and_phxy_interfaces.error_message: Number of irb and phX.Y interfaces cannot be greater than 4000

max_qinq_interfaces.error_message: Number of unique Stags cannot be greater than 4000

pwhe_service_impact.description: Each PWHE/FXC service with Q-in-Q consumes from multiple pools

example.bottleneck: PH pool (1544 remaining, need 2 per service)

SW-69017.scale: Original scale: 8K IPv4, 4K IPv6 installed simple rules

SW-139913.scale: Increased to 12K IPv4, 4K IPv6 (customer: Tata, comparing Juniper 64K/Cisco 32K over J2)
SW-139913.note: This is the ticket that bumped IPv4 from 8K to 12K. YANG max-elements was NOT updated to match.

SW-206883.scale: Confirms 12K IPv4, 4K IPv6 installed simple rules. ~20K routes total, ~8 VPN peers.
SW-206883.note: DP scale matches SW-139913. All scale can be across different VRFs or in specific VRF.

SW-182546.features: VRF support for flowspec, DP resources shared among ALL entries regardless of VRF, vrf match criteria (SW-226319)

SW-226319.summary: CLI Config | flowspec-local-policies ipv4/6 match-class vrf
SW-226319.feature: vrf <vrf-name> match criteria in match-class. Default: match any VRF. Operator advised to add VRF to local-policy match when flowspec used on multiple VRFs.

hw_tcam_per_ncp.source: show system npu-resources resource-type flowspec (PE-4 live 2026-02-22)
hw_tcam_per_ncp.jira_source: SW-139913 (scale increase to 12K), confirmed by SW-206883
hw_tcam_per_ncp.note: HW TCAM entries per NCP. Shared between BGP flowspec and local-policies. A complex match-class may expand to multiple HW entries.

config_model_limits_yang.note: YANG max-elements still 8000 from SW-69017 era. HW TCAM was increased to 12K by SW-139913 but YANG was NOT updated. Real DP limit is 12K IPv4.

flowspec._max_flowspec_interfaces_source: Confluence '(v25.2) Interface Scale & RNR' (page 5034508295): 'flowspec supports all 8k interfaces'
flowspec._max_vrfs_with_flowspec_note: No FlowSpec-specific VRF limit. Follows platform VRF scale: 1.5k (v25.2) / 8k (v25.3+). Source: Confluence '(v25.2) Interface Scale & RNR' + SW-182546 'DP resources shared regardless of VRF'

bgp_neighbor_afi_safi.description: BGP neighbor address-families for Flowspec VPN (Epic SW-182545)

vrf_flowspec_config.hierarchy: network-services vrf instance NAME protocols bgp ASN address-family ipv4/6-flowspec
vrf_flowspec_config.description: Import flowspec VPN routes into non-default VRF by route-target

local_policy_actions.note: redirect-to-ip is NOT supported for local policies (only BGP flowspec)

local_policy_match_criteria.protocol: Named protocol or hex (130+ options, see FLOWSPEC_LOCAL_POLICIES_FULL_MAP.md)
local_policy_match_criteria.vrf: VRF name (restrict match to traffic from specific VRF, SW-182546/SW-226319)

match_criteria.tcp_flag: syn, ack, fin, rst, psh, urg

flowspec.flowspec_local_policies_source: dn-flowspec-local-policies.yang (config model, outdated max-elements), show system npu-resources (HW TCAM), fsvpn_wizard.py (capacity constants), Jira SW-139913 (scale increase)

sources_checked: Jira SW-139913 (scale increase to 12K IPv4, Verified)
Jira SW-182546 (DP enabler, VRF support, In Scrum QA)
dn-flowspec-local-policies.yang (max-elements 8000 - outdated, not updated after SW-139913)
show system npu-resources resource-type flowspec (PE-4 live: 12000/4000 per NCP)
discrepancies_found: YANG max-elements 8000 IPv4 not updated after SW-139913 scale increase to 12K (yang_outdated=true)
cli_rules_db.py had max_flowspec_rules_total=10000 vs Jira SW-206883 says 20000
interactive_scale.py fallbacks used old values (256 policies, 1024 match-classes)
Test plan v2 Appendix B still shows old limits (256 policies, 1024 match-classes)

assign_new_if_index.description: Fails when ifindex pool is exhausted during allocation
possible_causes: PH pool (58882-65025) exhausted - too many phX + phX.Y interfaces
Stag pool (88001-92000) exhausted - too many Q-in-Q interfaces
IRB pool (41985-46080) exhausted - too many IRB interfaces
assign_new_if_index.solution: Check pool usage with 'Stag Pool Check' in SCALER wizard

validate_number_of_qinq_interfaces.error_message: Number of unique Stags cannot be greater than 4000

validate_number_of_irb_and_phxy_interfac.description: Validates combined IRB + phX.Y count before commit
validate_number_of_irb_and_phxy_interfac.error_message: Number of irb and phX.Y interfaces cannot be greater than 4000

notes.source: DNOS source code analysis - interface_manager_consts.py, consts.py, interface_validations.py
notes.verified_by: Live kernel query on PE-1 inband-engine container

pool_summary.stag_pool_4000: ALL Q-in-Q interfaces (ANY interface with outer-tag) - ifindex 88001-92000
pool_summary.vlan_pool_20480: Physical sub-interfaces ifindex allocation (ge-X.Y, lag-X.Y) - ifindex 13313-33792
pool_summary.note: Both pools may be used! VLAN pool for ifindex, STAG pool for unique (parent, outer-tag) tracking

l3_internal_index_limit.applies_to: ALL dp_interface_types: VLAN (L2-AC), PHXY (PWHE), LAG, IRB, PHX, PHYSICAL, ISLE, ISPO

stag_pool_VERIFIED.what_consumes_stag: ANY interface with outer_vlan_id (vlan-tags outer-tag X inner-tag Y)
stag_pool_VERIFIED.applies_to: BOTH L2-AC (ge-*, lag-*) AND PWHE (ph*) with vlan-tags outer-tag

verified_from_source.conclusion: STAG pool limit (4000) applies to ALL Q-in-Q interfaces (L2-AC + PWHE). The 8000 internal_index limit is separate and applies to ALL datapath interfaces.

hardware_model_mapping.description: Maps GI mode hardware models to DNOS system-types for deployment (from Confluence Platforms and FW info)

ASA926-18XKE.description: NCP5 - Accton J3 AI cluster (E variant)

hardware_model_mapping.note: Use 'show system' in GI mode to see Hardware Model, then map to system-type
